mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `task_instance` t INNER JOIN `project_module_instance` m ON m.`module_instance_id` = t.`module_instance_id` WHERE m.`project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND t.`assignee_user_id` = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND t.`task_status` = 'OPEN' LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `task_instance` t INNER JOIN `project_module_instance` m ON m.`module_instance_id` = t.`module_instance_id` WHERE m.`project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND t.`candidate_role_code` = #{candidateRoleCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND t.`task_status` = 'OPEN' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `task_instance` SET `task_status` = 'COMPLETED', `completed_at` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND `task_status` = 'OPEN'

UPDATE `task_instance` SET `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `node_id` = #{nodeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `state_code` = #{stateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `assignee_user_id` = #{assigneeUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `candidate_role_code` = #{candidateRoleCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `task_status` = #{taskStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `round_no` = #{roundNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `claimed_at` = #{claimedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `completed_at` = #{completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `deadline_at` = #{deadlineAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE `task_instance_id` = #{taskInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
